name: env-mise
description: Activate mise-managed environment (tools + env vars) for workspace subprocesses

settings.label: Always trust mise config
settings.description: When mise reports config files as not trusted, run `mise trust` automatically. mise normally requires per-path trust — enabling this bypasses that for zero-friction activation.

settings.label: Timeout (seconds)
settings.description: Maximum time to wait for `mise env`. Heavy mise toolchains that pull missing runtimes on first hit can exceed 60 seconds; raise this when a workspace fails with `mise timed out`. Per-repo overrides live in Repo Settings → Environment.
